name: apollo-rust-best-practices
description: Idiomatic, safe, and performant Rust guidance from Apollo GraphQL.

interface.longDescription: Write and review idiomatic Rust using Apollo GraphQL guidance for ownership, errors, linting, performance, testing, dispatch, type state, documentation, and pointers.
defaultPrompt: Use Apollo Rust Best Practices for this Rust task.
Review this Rust code for idiomatic ownership and error handling.
Apply Apollo's Rust performance and Clippy guidance.
